expected_path_note: SC1=N (honorary, non-executive) -> SC2=Y -> SC3=N (5%) -> DE4=N (pension dominates) -> exit
name: Synthetic Construction Partner 25 – Honorary Chairman No Executive Role Small Stake
activities: Heinrich Baumgartner, aged 78, is the founder and today the honorary chairman of a contracting group active on national infrastructure projects in Angola. Since his retirement nine years ago the honorary title carries no executive authority: he does not attend management meetings, has no signing power and no vote, and appears only at company anniversaries. He retained a 5% stake from the succession; his income is a pension and dividends, the latter a small fraction, and his wealth consists mainly of real estate and bonds accumulated before retirement.
origin_of_assets: Career earnings as a contractor, converted into real estate and bonds before 2017.

total_assets.remarks_total_assets: Predominantly real estate and bonds; small residual stake.
